title: Smart Hospital Management System — Landing Page & Role-Based Login

requirements.summary: Create a responsive Landing Page with a medical-blue, clean-white, and soft-gray visual theme ensuring trustworthy and tech-forward design with consistent typography, spacing, and color usage
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette consistently uses medical blues, white backgrounds, and soft gray accents
Page is fully responsive on mobile (320px+) and desktop (1280px+)
Typography is clean and professional throughout

file_operations.description: Define global CSS custom properties for the medical-blue color palette (primary blues, clean whites, soft grays), set base typography rules for clean professional fonts, and ensure consistent spacing variables for the entire application

Extend Tailwind theme with custom color tokens for medical blues, soft grays, and white backgrounds; configure responsive breakpoints for 320px+ mobile and 1280px+ desktop; add custom spacing scale for consistent layout

Create the main Landing Page component with responsive container layout, applying the medical-blue theme consistently across all sections, ensuring mobile-first responsive design with proper breakpoints

requirements.summary: Implement a Hero Section with headline 'Next-Generation Healthcare Management', subheadline emphasizing speed and AI-driven features, primary CTA 'Book an Appointment', and red secondary CTA 'EMERGENCY: Find Nearest Hospital'
acceptanceCriteria: Headline 'Next-Generation Healthcare Management' is prominently displayed
Subheadline references speed, AI-driven scheduling, and real-time emergency routing
'Book an Appointment' button is styled as the primary action
'EMERGENCY: Find Nearest Hospital' button is red and visually prominent
Both buttons are clearly visible on mobile and desktop

file_operations.description: Create Hero Section component with full-width layout containing the headline 'Next-Generation Healthcare Management', subheadline emphasizing speed/AI-driven scheduling/real-time emergency routing, primary 'Book an Appointment' button (medical blue), and visually distinct red 'EMERGENCY: Find Nearest Hospital' button; use the generated hero background image from frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png as the section background; ensure responsive typography and button sizing for mobile and desktop

requirements.summary: Implement a Key Features Section displaying four core technical pillars as visual cards: Lightning-Fast Records, AI-Powered Scheduling, Real-Time Emergency Routing, and Flawless Resource Management
acceptanceCriteria: All four feature pillars are displayed with distinct icons or visual indicators
Each pillar card includes a title and descriptive text matching the specified content
Section layout adapts gracefully from single-column on mobile to multi-column on desktop

file_operations.description: Create Key Features Section component with a grid layout displaying four feature cards: (1) Lightning-Fast Records with instant patient history retrieval description, (2) AI-Powered Scheduling with smart overbooking prevention and zero wait times using predictive ML description, (3) Real-Time Emergency Routing with location-based immediate hospital matching description, (4) Flawless Resource Management with conflict-free bed allocation and doctor scheduling description; include distinct icons for each pillar; implement responsive grid (single-column mobile, multi-column desktop)

requirements.summary: Implement a Footer with standard navigation links (Home, Features, Contact), contact information, and a clearly labeled link to the Login portal
acceptanceCriteria: Footer contains navigation links including Home, Features, and Contact
Contact information (e.g., email or phone placeholder) is present
A 'Login' link in the footer navigates to the Login page
Footer is responsive and stacks gracefully on mobile

file_operations.description: Create Footer component with navigation links (Home, Features, Contact), contact information placeholders (email/phone), and a 'Login' link that navigates to '/login'; implement responsive layout that stacks vertically on mobile and spreads horizontally on desktop; apply medical-blue theme colors

requirements.summary: Create a Role-Based Login Page with centered minimalist design, role selection toggle (Patient, Doctor, Admin), and login form with Email and Password fields
acceptanceCriteria: Three role tabs (Patient, Doctor, Admin) are displayed and selectable
Active role tab is visually distinguished from inactive tabs
Email and Password fields are present and labeled
Submit/Login button is clearly visible
Layout is centered on all screen sizes
Form is accessible with proper labels and input types

file_operations.description: Create Login Page component with centered layout containing a role selection tab bar (Patient, Doctor, Admin) at the top with visual highlighting for the active role, followed by a login form with labeled Email (type='email') and Password (type='password') input fields, and a Submit/Login button; implement responsive centered design that works on all screen sizes; apply medical-blue theme with accessible form labels

requirements.summary: Set up client-side routing so '/' renders Landing Page and '/login' renders Login Page, with navigation wired through CTAs and footer links
acceptanceCriteria: '/' route renders the Landing Page
'/login' route renders the Login Page
Clicking the footer Login link navigates to '/login'
Clicking 'Book an Appointment' navigates to '/login' pre-selecting the Patient role (or scrolls to a relevant section)
Browser back/forward navigation works correctly

file_operations.description: Set up React Router with routes: '/' rendering LandingPage and '/login' rendering LoginPage; ensure browser back/forward navigation works correctly

Wire 'Book an Appointment' button to navigate to '/login' (optionally with state to pre-select Patient role); wire 'EMERGENCY: Find Nearest Hospital' button action (can be placeholder or navigate to '/login')
Wire the 'Login' link in the footer to navigate to '/login' using React Router Link component
Compose the Landing Page by importing and rendering HeroSection, KeyFeaturesSection, and Footer components in the correct order

requirements.summary: Wire the generated hero background image into the Landing Page Hero Section as a full-width background visual
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section uses the generated image as a background or decorative visual
Image is served from frontend/public/assets/generated/
Image renders crisply on both mobile and desktop

file_operations.description: Reference the generated hero background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png as a background image for the Hero Section; ensure it covers the full width and renders crisply on both mobile and desktop viewports using CSS background-size and background-position properties
